title: wolftpm::Device::open doc says '/dev/tpm0 via kernel driver' but does not mention /dev/tpmrm0
description: wolftpm/src/device.rs Device::open doc says 'Open a connection to the TPM via the Linux kernel driver (/dev/tpm0).' The WolfTpmLinuxDev counterpart in wolftpm-tss correctly says '/dev/tpm0 or /dev/tpmrm0'. /dev/tpmrm0 (resource manager) is the preferred path on modern Linux. Users who have /dev/tpmrm0 but not /dev/tpm0 will expect open() to work and the doc gives no hint whether it will. Fix: add '/dev/tpmrm0' to the doc.
